name: property managers processing 5–15 utility bills/month tool
description: For property managers processing 5–15 invoices/month, inefficient data compilation causes inaccurate monthly reports. We automate the extraction and compilation of utility bill data instead of manual data entry and report generation.
problem_solved: Inefficient compilation of utility bill data into monthly reports.

locked_fields.primary_problem: Inefficient compilation of utility bill data into monthly reports.
locked_fields.mvp_wedge: For property managers processing 5–15 invoices/month, inefficient data compilation causes inaccurate monthly reports. We automate the extraction and compilation of utility bill data instead of manual data entry and report generation.
locked_fields.current_alternative: manual data entry and report generation

one_liner: For property managers processing 5–15 invoices/month, inefficient data compilation causes inaccurate monthly reports. We automate the extraction and compilation of utility bill data instead of manual data entry and report generation.
